summary: Tested public homepage API endpoint GET /api/admin/public/homepage-data. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). The endpoint correctly returns categories and tiles without authentication, in frontend-friendly format.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Public API GET /api/admin/public/homepage-data works without authentication
✓ Response format matches frontend expectations: {ok, source, data: [{id, title, helperCopy, tiles}]}
✓ Tiles have correct structure: {id, shortTitle, fullTitle, iconType}
✓ Admin changes (create/update/delete categories/tiles) reflect immediately in public API
✓ Deactivated tiles/categories are hidden from public API response
✓ MongoDB _id fields are properly excluded from response
✓ Frontend HomeScreen.jsx correctly fetches from public API and falls back to defaults on error
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing categories (love, career, health) and tiles (18 total)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public homepage API fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_public_homepage_api.py covers: no-auth access, response format, admin changes reflection, deactivation hiding, concurrent requests, and MongoDB _id exclusion. Frontend visual testing skipped due to Google OAuth requirement.

backend_api_tests.response_structure: PASS - Has ok, source, data fields
backend_api_tests.categories_format: PASS - Categories have id, title, helperCopy, tiles
backend_api_tests.tiles_format: PASS - Tiles have id, shortTitle, fullTitle, iconType
backend_api_tests.expected_categories: PASS - love, career, health categories present
backend_api_tests.create_category_reflects: PASS - New category immediately visible in public API
backend_api_tests.create_tile_reflects: PASS - New tile immediately visible in public API
backend_api_tests.deactivate_tile_hides: PASS - Deactivated tile hidden from public API
